title: Smoky Beef Skewers
description: Enjoy the unique flavor of smoky beef skewers, perfect for a barbecue or outdoor gathering. This recipe is a twist on traditional Australian beef skewers.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lime juice, garlic, salt, and black pepper.
Add the beef strips to the bowl and toss to coat.
Thread the beef strips onto the skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the smoky BBQ sauce onto both sides of the beef.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until the beef is cooked through.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro.
Let the skewers rest for 2-3 minutes before serving.
